CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Roh_Artikelnummer_Level1](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[PartOrder] [int] NULL,
	[Name] [varchar](255) NULL,
	[Part] [varchar](255) NULL,
	[ClassificationId] [int] NULL,
	[IncludeInDescription] [bit] NULL,
	[Seperator] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[ValueInDescription] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[OrderInDescription] [int] NULL,
	[ValueAtBeginningOfDescription] [nvarchar](max) NULL
)
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Roh_Artikelnummer_Level2](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[IdLevelOne] [int] NULL,
	[Name] [varchar](255) NULL,
	[Required] [bit] NULL,
	[IsFreeText] [bit] NULL,
	[OrderInDescription] [int] NULL,
	[ImpactNumberGeneration] [bit] NULL,
	[PartOrder] [int] NULL,
	[Part] [nvarchar](4) NULL,
	[IncludeInDescription] [bit] NULL,
	[Sepertor] [varchar](max) NULL,
	[IsRange] [bit] NULL,
	[Prefix] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[Suffix] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
)
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Roh_Artikelnummer_Level3](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[IdLevelOne] [int] NULL,
	[IdLevelTwo] [int] NULL,
	[PartOrder] [int] NULL,
	[Name] [varchar](255) NULL,
	[Part] [varchar](255) NULL,
	[IncludeInDescription] [bit] NULL,
	[IsFreeText] [bit] NULL,
)
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Roh_Artikelnummer_Level2_Range_Values](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[IdLevelTwo] [int] NULL,
	[FromOrTwo] [int] NULL,
	[RangeValue] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
)
alter table Artikel 
add Manufacturer nvarchar(500) null;

alter table Artikel 
add ManufacturerNumber nvarchar(255) null;
